docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,091.22 FILED BY ROETZER NORBERT F AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
